channel.title: AI Practical Guide
channel.description: Recent content on AI Practical Guide

item.title: Welcome to AI Practical Guide
item.description: Discover practical AI tutorials, automation guides, and useful digital tools.

item.title: About
item.description:
AI Practical Guide publishes beginner-friendly tutorials about artificial intelligence, automation, productivity, and digital tools.

Our content focuses on practical steps, honest testing, clear explanations, and reliable sources.

We aim to help individuals, creators, freelancers, and small businesses use technology more effectively.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
For questions, feedback, corrections, or business inquiries, please contact us by email.

Email: alyammahi.aysha96@gmail.com

item.title: Disclaimer
item.description:
The information published on this website is provided for educational and informational purposes only.

Technology, artificial intelligence tools, software features, prices, and policies may change over time.

Readers should verify important information through official sources before making financial, legal, medical, or business decisions.

Some articles may contain affiliate links or advertisements. This does not affect our commitment to providing honest and useful content.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
This website respects the privacy of its visitors.

We may use analytics services, advertising services, and cookies to understand website performance and improve the user experience.

Third-party services, including Google AdSense, may use cookies to display relevant advertisements and measure advertising performance.

We do not sell personal information.

Visitors can disable cookies through their browser settings.

This privacy policy may be updated when new services or features are added to the website.
